title: campanula cervicaria var. lingulata
intro: Campanula cervicaria var. lingulata, also known as the bellflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, Campanula cervicaria var. lingulata has been used in herbal medicine, primarily due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant effects. Campanula cervicaria var. lingulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
